# iosxe_key_chain (Data Source)

This data source can read the Key Chain configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iosxe_key_chain" "example" {
  name = "OSPF-AUTH"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The path of the retrieved object.
- `keys` (Attributes List) Configure a key (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys))
- `macsec` (Boolean)
- `tcp` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys`

Read-Only:

- `accept_ao_mismatch` (Boolean) Accept packets with HMAC mismatch
- `accept_lifetime_duration` (Number) Key lifetime duration (in seconds)
- `accept_lifetime_end_day` (Number) Key lifetime end day
- `accept_lifetime_end_month` (String) Key lifetime end month
- `accept_lifetime_end_time` (String) Key lifetime end time
- `accept_lifetime_end_year` (Number) Key lifetime end year
- `accept_lifetime_infinite` (Boolean) Infinite lifetime
- `accept_lifetime_local` (Boolean) Specify time in local timezone
- `accept_lifetime_start_day` (Number) Key lifetime start day
- `accept_lifetime_start_month` (String) Key lifetime start month
- `accept_lifetime_start_time` (String) Key lifetime start time
- `accept_lifetime_start_year` (Number) Key lifetime start year
- `cryptographic_algorithm` (String)
- `cryptographic_algorithm_macsec` (String)
- `cryptographic_algorithm_tcp` (String)
- `id` (String) Key identifier - (0-2147483674) for regular key chain and hex number with even number digits for macsec key chain
- `include_tcp_options` (Boolean) Include tcp options in HMAC calculation
- `key_string_encryption` (String) Key encryption method
- `key_string_key` (String, Sensitive)
- `macsec_lifetime_duration` (Number) Key lifetime duration (in seconds)
- `macsec_lifetime_end_day` (Number) Key lifetime end day
- `macsec_lifetime_end_month` (String) Key lifetime end month
- `macsec_lifetime_end_time` (String) Key lifetime end time
- `macsec_lifetime_end_year` (Number) Key lifetime end year
- `macsec_lifetime_infinite` (Boolean) Infinite lifetime
- `macsec_lifetime_local` (Boolean) Specify time in local timezone
- `macsec_lifetime_start_day` (Number) Key lifetime start day
- `macsec_lifetime_start_month` (String) Key lifetime start month
- `macsec_lifetime_start_time` (String) Key lifetime start time
- `macsec_lifetime_start_year` (Number) Key lifetime start year
- `recv_id` (Number) configure a receive id
- `send_id` (Number) configure a send id
- `send_lifetime_duration` (Number) Key lifetime duration (in seconds)
- `send_lifetime_end_day` (Number) Key lifetime end day
- `send_lifetime_end_month` (String) Key lifetime end month
- `send_lifetime_end_time` (String) Key lifetime end time
- `send_lifetime_end_year` (Number) Key lifetime end year
- `send_lifetime_infinite` (Boolean) Infinite lifetime
- `send_lifetime_local` (Boolean) Specify time in local timezone
- `send_lifetime_start_day` (Number) Key lifetime start day
- `send_lifetime_start_month` (String) Key lifetime start month
- `send_lifetime_start_time` (String) Key lifetime start time
- `send_lifetime_start_year` (Number) Key lifetime start year
